//: GitHub Codespaces fallback deploy. Spin up a codespace and Code-spaces forwards port 8080 as a public HTTPS URL — 60 hours/month free for personal accounts. Useful as a last-resort judging endpoint when no other host is up.
name: AEP MCP Server (Codespaces)
postCreateCommand:
npm install && cd mcp-server && npm run build && cp -n .env.devnet .env || true && echo '
Next steps:
  1. echo AEP_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN=$(openssl rand -hex 32) > mcp-server/.env.hosted
  2. AEP_MCP_TRANSPORT=http AEP_MCP_HTTP_HOST=0.0.0.0 AEP_MCP_HTTP_PORT=8080 AEP_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN=<paste> node mcp-server/dist/index.js
  3. Open the PORTS panel → port 8080 → Make Public → copy URL
  4. Paste URL into claude.ai/settings/connectors with the token as bearer
'
